title: EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: HOMELESS OUTREACH & ADVOCACY PROJECT EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers limited financial assistance with rent, electric, gas, water bills, and life-sustaining prescription medications. The amount of assistance varies depending on the amount due and if assistance has been received previously. 694 Church Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete online application form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, utility bill, or documention of need. Additional documents may be requested. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the intersection of Union and Church Streets. On various primary bus routes. Walking distance from downtown core area. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS OUTREACH AND ADVOCACY PROJECT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE LIFELINE TRANSPORTATION - CHERRIOTS DAY PASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOMELESS OUTREACH & ADVOCACY PROJECT
